product_description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. It uses AI to streamline the video editing process, saving creators hours of manual work.

policies.refund_policy: AutoStream offers a 7-day refund window from the date of subscription. No refunds are issued after 7 days.
policies.support_policy: 24/7 live support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support with a 24-48 hour response time.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing period.
policies.free_trial: AutoStream does not currently offer a free trial, but a 7-day money-back guarantee is available on both plans.
policies.upgrade_downgrade: You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Prorated billing applies on upgrades.

faqs.question: What video formats does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM formats for both input and output.

faqs.question: Can I use AutoStream on mobile?
faqs.answer: AutoStream is primarily a web-based platform optimized for desktop. A mobile app is on the roadmap for Q3 2025.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream work with YouTube?
faqs.answer: Yes! AutoStream integrates directly with YouTube for seamless uploads. It also supports Instagram, TikTok, and Twitch exports.

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: There is no permanent free plan, but all plans come with a 7-day money-back guarantee so you can try risk-free.

faqs.question: How does the AI captioning work?
faqs.answer: AutoStream's Pro plan uses advanced speech-to-text AI to auto-generate accurate captions in 30+ languages, which you can then edit and style.
